Silent Night (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,012,103Details
International Box Office $1,882,557
Worldwide Box Office $9,894,660
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $836,488
Total $836,488
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A tormented father witnesses his young son die when caught in a gang’s crossfire on Christmas Eve. While recovering from a wound that costs him his voice, the man makes vengeance his life’s mission and embarks on a punishing training regimen in order to avenge his son’s death.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,010,207 (37.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:81.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,870 opening theaters/1,873 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,758,547

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 1st, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: November 30th, 2023 (Limited), released as Silent Night (Немая ярость) (Russia (CIS))
November 30th, 2023 (Limited) (Italy)
November 30th, 2023 (Wide), released as Venganza Silenciosa (Venezuela)
December 1st, 2023 (Limited) (Spain)
December 7th, 2023 (Limited), released as O Silêncio da Vingança (Brazil)
Video Release: December 19th, 2023 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, drug use and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2799 (cert #54266), 9/6/2023)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Filming location (country): Mexico
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Gangs, Revenge
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Thunder Road Film, Capstone Group LLC, A Better Tomorrow Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
